message:
fix(gpu): utilization query limit, cancellable worker, per-reservation context (#6965-#6967) (#6974)

- Add configurable LIMIT to GetUtilizationSnapshots SQL query with
  DefaultSnapshotQueryLimit constant (default 500) to prevent unbounded
  result sets from long-lived reservations (#6965)
- Derive collection contexts from a cancellable baseCtx so Stop() can
  immediately cancel in-flight Kubernetes API calls (#6966)
- Give each reservation its own goroutine and timeout via sync.WaitGroup
  so a slow cluster cannot starve subsequent reservations (#6967)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -169,7 +169,7 @@ type Store interface {
 
 	// GPU Utilization Snapshots
 	InsertUtilizationSnapshot(snapshot *models.GPUUtilizationSnapshot) error
-	GetUtilizationSnapshots(reservationID string) ([]models.GPUUtilizationSnapshot, error)
+	GetUtilizationSnapshots(reservationID string, limit int) ([]models.GPUUtilizationSnapshot, error)
 	GetBulkUtilizationSnapshots(reservationIDs []string) (map[string][]models.GPUUtilizationSnapshot, error)
 	DeleteOldUtilizationSnapshots(before time.Time) (int64, error)
 	ListActiveGPUReservations() ([]models.GPUReservation, error)
